descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average characteristic dimension of crystalline grains
descriptors.rationale: controls mechanical properties via Hall-Petch relationship

quality.loss_reason: single value loses full distribution shape
quality.notes: loses spatial heterogeneity and distribution tails

descriptors.name: grain boundary character
descriptors.physical_meaning: distribution of grain boundary misorientation types
descriptors.rationale: boundary type determines diffusion and crack propagation

representation.notes: bins for Sigma3, Sigma5, through high-angle

quality.loss_reason: binning loses exact boundary angles and planes
quality.notes: loses axis-angle pair details within bins

descriptors.name: crystallographic texture
descriptors.physical_meaning: preferred grain orientation distribution in polycrystal
descriptors.rationale: determines anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

representation.notes: truncate at l=8 for computational efficiency

quality.loss_reason: truncation loses higher frequency texture components
quality.notes: l=8 adequate for moderate textures only

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total line length of dislocations per volume
descriptors.rationale: governs strain hardening and yield strength

quality.loss_reason: loses spatial distribution and character types
quality.notes: ignores edge versus screw character distinction

descriptors.name: precipitate distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: spatial and size statistics of strengthening particles
descriptors.rationale: precipitation strengthening depends on size and spacing

quality.loss_reason: statistical summary loses exact spatial configuration
quality.notes: loses clustering patterns and correlation functions

descriptors.name: subgrain structure
descriptors.physical_meaning: low-angle boundaries subdividing parent grain interiors

representation.notes: mean size plus misorientation angle histogram

quality.loss_reason: histogram loses exact subgrain arrangement topology
quality.notes: spatial correlations between subgrains not captured

descriptors.name: stored elastic energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: integrated strain energy from lattice distortions
descriptors.rationale: driving force for recovery and recrystallization

quality.loss_reason: integration loses spatial distribution of strain
quality.notes: loses localization information critical for nucleation
